rationales.hook_strength: 'Blood-sugar sponge' is concrete and slightly surprising — stops the scroll, though it won't shock anyone already in the metabolic-health rabbit hole.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is one tight idea with a clear mechanism, and the action items (lift twice, walk after meals) are specific enough to do this week.
rationales.audience_fit: Steady energy and carb handling land well for the tired-by-3pm crowd, though 'GLUT4 transporters' on slide 3 risks losing the less science-curious viewer.
rationales.novelty: Muscle-as-glucose-sink is well-trodden metabolic content; the GLUT4 framing adds a layer, but this angle has been done many times on health TikTok.
rationales.brand_fit: Voice is plain and direct, health claims are hedged ('may improve', 'meaningfully improves'), no hype words, and the CTA connects naturally to the Health Score product.
rationales.predicted_performance: Strong saves from the metabolic-health niche but limited viral ceiling — the topic is familiar enough that broad audiences won't feel compelled to share.
